assertionResults.title: session:update increments iteration

assertionResults.title: session:update --delete removes session

assertionResults.fullName: Stop hook core lifecycle exits 0 (allows exit) when no session state exists
assertionResults.title: exits 0 (allows exit) when no session state exists

assertionResults.fullName: Stop hook core lifecycle blocks exit when active session state exists
assertionResults.title: blocks exit when active session state exists

assertionResults.fullName: Stop hook core lifecycle increments iteration counter on each invocation
assertionResults.title: increments iteration counter on each invocation

assertionResults.fullName: Stop hook core lifecycle detects completion proof and allows exit
assertionResults.title: detects completion proof and allows exit

assertionResults.fullName: Stop hook core lifecycle handles empty JSON input gracefully
assertionResults.title: handles empty JSON input gracefully

assertionResults.fullName: Stop hook iteration safety limits allows exit when max iterations reached
assertionResults.title: allows exit when max iterations reached

assertionResults.fullName: Stop hook iteration safety limits allows exit when iterations are too fast (runaway detection)
assertionResults.title: allows exit when iterations are too fast (runaway detection)

assertionResults.fullName: Stop hook transcript parsing handles missing transcript gracefully
assertionResults.title: handles missing transcript gracefully

assertionResults.fullName: Stop hook transcript parsing allows exit when transcript has no assistant messages
assertionResults.title: allows exit when transcript has no assistant messages

assertionResults.fullName: Stop hook transcript parsing allows exit when assistant message has only non-text content
assertionResults.title: allows exit when assistant message has only non-text content

assertionResults.fullName: Stop hook run state handling blocks exit and tells agent to extract proof when run is completed but no promise tag
assertionResults.title: blocks exit and tells agent to extract proof when run is completed but no promise tag

assertionResults.fullName: Stop hook run state handling blocks exit when completed run has wrong promise value
assertionResults.title: blocks exit when completed run has wrong promise value

assertionResults.fullName: Stop hook run state handling blocks exit and reports waiting effects when run has pending tasks
assertionResults.title: blocks exit and reports waiting effects when run has pending tasks

assertionResults.fullName: Stop hook run state handling blocks exit and reports failure when run is failed
assertionResults.title: blocks exit and reports failure when run is failed

assertionResults.fullName: Stop hook run state handling allows exit when run directory is misconfigured (empty state)
assertionResults.title: allows exit when run directory is misconfigured (empty state)
